final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it explicitly excludes capitalized leases, which matches the baseline STD definition better than the candidate total that includes leases. Avoided selecting lease-related rows and avoided double counting with broader totals.
